registry_notes: Default two-team Hermes competition registry. No secrets, credentials, endpoints, or broker access. Discord talks to these agent identities; Python code owns all risk and broker boundaries.

teams.description: Balanced Hermes team for proposal research, risk review, and post-round review.
teams.learning_notes: Try to beat SPY with proposal-first strategies while respecting deterministic risk gates.

agents.description: Develops structured strategy proposal JSON for sandbox review.
agents.learning_notes: Focus on proposals that can be compared against SPY.

agents.description: Reviews risk assumptions and rejection reasons before paper-only approval paths.
weaknesses: slow to accept new strategy families
agents.learning_notes: Flag missing thesis, confidence, symbol, collateral, or borrow assumptions.

agents.description: Summarizes tournament results, SPY comparison, and team lessons.
weaknesses: needs enough logged rounds for stronger conclusions
agents.learning_notes: Compare route quality, rejections, and benchmark results.

teams.description: Experimental Hermes team for proposal research, risk review, and post-round review.
teams.learning_notes: Try to beat SPY with differentiated proposal sets while respecting deterministic risk gates.

agents.description: Develops structured strategy proposal JSON for sandbox review.
agents.learning_notes: Focus on proposals with clear benchmark and drawdown rationale.

agents.description: Reviews risk assumptions and rejection reasons before paper-only approval paths.
agents.learning_notes: Flag uncollateralized options, 0DTE options, and missing borrow assumptions.

agents.description: Summarizes tournament results, SPY comparison, and team lessons.
weaknesses: needs enough logged rounds for stronger conclusions
